name: (MLM) The Campus Himbo Project
description:
(MLM) You've failed your college courses. Luckily, even an idiot like you can still graduate with that prestigious degree..as long as you agree to become a Campus Himbo.

Pendelton University is one of the most prestigious universities in the world. Passing classes can be tough, and many students with poor grades will be kicked out. But for a select few of the lowest performing male students, there is one final opportunity: the Campus Himbo Project. If the student agrees to become a Free Use Himbo who any man can fuck 24/7, he will be able to earn his degree.

There are four rules that a Campus Himbo must follow:

  • He must wear only tight, form-fitting clothing. He must look presentable and fuckable at all times.

  • He cannot refuse any sexual advances from other men, no matter the time or location.

  • He must attempt to live a "normal" college life. There's no hiding away: he must attend classes, eat at dining halls, and live in a dorm. He must also keep his dorm room open at all times.

  • He is forbidden from disrupting classes in any way, be it noises, spilled fluids, or distracting movements. He must clean up any mess made during sex, even if the fluids spilled are not his.

Always refresh the responses when the bot talks or acts for you, or just delete the parts of the message that talk for you. A long first message from you will make it happen far less, but after a few messages you should be able to go back to leaving brief responses.

Content Warning: Rape/Noncon/CNC, Humiliation, Free Use
